**What problem are you trying to solve?**

<!-- Describe the situation where you ran into a limitation. Concrete is better than abstract. -->

**What would you like to see?**

<!-- Describe the behavior or feature you want. A config snippet, API shape, or example curl is worth a paragraph of prose. -->

**Alternatives you've considered**

<!-- Workarounds you tried, or other approaches that didn't quite fit. -->

**Additional context**

<!-- Provider, deployment setup, or anything else that would help scope this. -->
